facility_terms.interest_rate_description: Commodity broker fees for Shariah-compliant Tawarruq structure — NOT the facility profit rate

definitions.Upfront Fee: USD 150, one-time, due on or before signing the CPA
definitions.Commodity Administration Fee: USD 7.50 per USD 1,000,000 of Purchase Price (pro rata), minimum USD 150 per transaction
definitions.Payment Terms: Invoiced in USD immediately after each Sale Transaction, due within 10 days
definitions.Suspension Right: DD&Co may suspend services if invoices unpaid within 10 days
definitions.ACP Backstop: If SPV cannot pay within 10 days, invoices forwarded to Amwal Capital Partners
